diagrams.title: 5-Stage RISC Pipeline Timing Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows instruction overlap across 5 pipeline stages (IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB) for multiple instructions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how pipeline achieves instruction-level parallelism and understand throughput calculation

diagrams.title: Pipeline Hazard Types
diagrams.description: Three types of hazards with examples and solutions
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for identifying and resolving pipeline hazards

diagrams.title: Bubble Formation in Pipeline
diagrams.description: Shows how a data hazard creates stalls/bubbles propagating through pipeline
diagrams.purpose: Understand how stalls affect pipeline performance and throughput reduction
